title: Detailed Moon
description: A resource pack giving the moon more detail, making it more interesting to zoom in on while still feeling vanilla.
body: # Detailed Moon When using a spyglass, the moon can look quite boring up close. This pack aims to fix that by giving the moon more detail, while keeping the underlying vanilla texture when viewed from afar. I recommend using this pack alongside something that makes the night sky more interesting, such as [Spyglass Astronomy](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-astronomy). ## Moon Phases ![A gif of a more detailed version of the vanilla moon, showing all phases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6016b902733d00f6bd9b9172046b7235848765d.gif) ## Demonstration
